section.heading: Administrative costs

content.p: A recipient may use up to 7.5 percent of any annual grant received under this part for administrative purposes. A recipient State shall share the amount available for administrative purposes pursuant to the preceding sentence with local governments funded by the State.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 100–77, title IV, § 418, as added Pub. L. 101–625, title VIII, § 832(b)(1), Nov. 28, 1990, 104 Stat. 4359; amended Pub. L. 111–22, div. B, title II, § 1204, May 20, 2009, 123 Stat. 1680.)

note.heading: Effective Date of 2009 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 111–22 effective on the earlier of 18 months after May 20, 2009, or 3 months after publication of certain final regulations by Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, see section 1503 of Pub. L. 111–22, set out as a note under section 11302 of this title.
